[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000110101 4
1 101101010 5
2 110111010 6
3 101101110 6
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a

01 10 000110100 3
12 21 001101110 5
23 32 001001101 4
34 43 101000011 4
45 54 101011111 7
56 65 011010000 3
67 76 011010100 4
70 07 000001111 4

13 31 000100011 3
24 42 100001110 4
35 53 000011100 3
46 64 110001111 6
57 75 000000100 1

61 16 011101111 7
72 27 001010101 4

15 51 000111111 6
